욥기 20:2.content: “Therefore my thoughts answer me, even by reason of my haste that is in me.

욥기 20:3.content: I have heard the reproof which puts me to shame. The spirit of my understanding answers me.

욥기 20:4.content: Don’t you know this from old time, since man was placed on earth,

욥기 20:5.content: that the triumphing of the wicked is short, the joy of the godless but for a moment?

욥기 20:6.content: Though his height mount up to the heavens, and his head reach to the clouds,

욥기 20:7.content: yet he will perish forever like his own dung. Those who have seen him will say, ‘Where is he?’

욥기 20:8.content: He will fly away as a dream, and will not be found. Yes, he will be chased away like a vision of the night.

욥기 20:9.content: The eye which saw him will see him no more, neither will his place see him any more.

욥기 20:10.content: His children will seek the favor of the poor. His hands will give back his wealth.

욥기 20:11.content: His bones are full of his youth, but youth will lie down with him in the dust.

욥기 20:12.content: “Though wickedness is sweet in his mouth, though he hide it under his tongue,

욥기 20:13.content: though he spare it, and will not let it go, but keep it still within his mouth;

욥기 20:14.content: yet his food in his bowels is turned. It is cobra venom within him.

욥기 20:15.content: He has swallowed down riches, and he will vomit them up again. God will cast them out of his belly.

욥기 20:16.content: He will suck cobra venom. The viper’s tongue will kill him.

욥기 20:17.content: He will not look at the rivers, the flowing streams of honey and butter.

욥기 20:18.content: He will restore that for which he labored, and will not swallow it down. He will not rejoice according to the substance that he has gotten.

욥기 20:19.content: For he has oppressed and forsaken the poor. He has violently taken away a house, and he will not build it up.

욥기 20:20.content: “Because he knew no quietness within him, he will not save anything of that in which he delights.

욥기 20:21.content: There was nothing left that he didn’t devour, therefore his prosperity will not endure.

욥기 20:22.content: In the fullness of his sufficiency, distress will overtake him. The hand of everyone who is in misery will come on him.

욥기 20:23.content: When he is about to fill his belly, God will cast the fierceness of his wrath on him. It will rain on him while he is eating.

욥기 20:24.content: He will flee from the iron weapon. The bronze arrow will strike him through.

욥기 20:25.content: He draws it out, and it comes out of his body. Yes, the glittering point comes out of his liver. Terrors are on him.

욥기 20:26.content: All darkness is laid up for his treasures. An unfanned fire will devour him. It will consume that which is left in his tent.

욥기 20:27.content: The heavens will reveal his iniquity. The earth will rise up against him.

욥기 20:28.content: The increase of his house will depart. They will rush away in the day of his wrath.

욥기 20:29.content: This is the portion of a wicked man from God, the heritage appointed to him by God.”
